field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Stable privacy-safe session/thread identifier shown as a short id.
field_mappings.differences: Claude transcripts are project-organized under encoded cwd directories.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Sanitized repo/workspace display name, never a raw path.
field_mappings.source: cwd basename or encoded project directory basename
field_mappings.differences: Claude may not include branch/repo metadata in each transcript.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Model/task round trips observed for a session.
field_mappings.source: assistant end_turn and non-tool user messages
field_mappings.differences: Claude turns are inferred from transcript records.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Privacy-safe count of tool launches grouped into Mission Control categories.
field_mappings.differences: Claude tool starts are embedded blocks, not top-level events.

field_mappings.normalized_meaning: Provider-normalized event kind consumed by Mission Control UI.
field_mappings.source: record_mappings[].normalized_kind below and tool_use/tool_result block mapping
field_mappings.differences: Claude must synthesize normalized tool events from message content blocks.

field_mappings.source: assistant message.usage; input max/latest, output additive
field_mappings.differences: Claude input must not be summed; output should be summed.
